prompt: Using the file evals/files/search-sample.ts, replace all occurrences of `console.error(...)` with `this.logger.error(...)` using ast-grep's rewrite capability. Show the diff/result.

assertions.text: Uses ast-grep rewrite (--rewrite flag or YAML fix) to perform the replacement
The rewrite uses meta-variables to capture the console.error arguments
The output shows the original and transformed code
The transformation preserves the arguments passed to console.error
